resume_action.description:
实验运行中（3 个任务），预计剩余 ~56min，每 5min 轮询一次
  phase1_factorial_trak_standard -> GPU[1] (elapsed 4min, ~56min left); phase1_factorial_trak_contrastive -> GPU[2] (elapsed 4min, ~56min left); phase1_factorial_repsim_standard -> GPU[3] (elapsed 4min, ~41min left)

experiment_monitor.check_cmd: test -f /home/jinxulin/sibyl_system/projects/CRA/exp/results/phase1_factorial_trak_standard_DONE && echo "phase1_factorial_trak_standard:DONE" || echo "phase1_factorial_trak_standard:PENDING" && test -f /home/jinxulin/sibyl_system/projects/CRA/exp/results/phase1_factorial_trak_contrastive_DONE && echo "phase1_factorial_trak_contrastive:DONE" || echo "phase1_factorial_trak_contrastive:PENDING" && test -f /home/jinxulin/sibyl_system/projects/CRA/exp/results/phase1_factorial_repsim_standard_DONE && echo "phase1_factorial_repsim_standard:DONE" || echo "phase1_factorial_repsim_standard:PENDING"
experiment_monitor.pid_check_cmd: pid=$(cat /home/jinxulin/sibyl_system/projects/CRA/exp/results/phase1_factorial_trak_standard.pid 2>/dev/null) && (ps -p $pid > /dev/null 2>&1 && echo "phase1_factorial_trak_standard:ALIVE:$pid" || echo "phase1_factorial_trak_standard:DEAD:$pid") || echo "phase1_factorial_trak_standard:NO_PID" && pid=$(cat /home/jinxulin/sibyl_system/projects/CRA/exp/results/phase1_factorial_trak_contrastive.pid 2>/dev/null) && (ps -p $pid > /dev/null 2>&1 && echo "phase1_factorial_trak_contrastive:ALIVE:$pid" || echo "phase1_factorial_trak_contrastive:DEAD:$pid") || echo "phase1_factorial_trak_contrastive:NO_PID" && pid=$(cat /home/jinxulin/sibyl_system/projects/CRA/exp/results/phase1_factorial_repsim_standard.pid 2>/dev/null) && (ps -p $pid > /dev/null 2>&1 && echo "phase1_factorial_repsim_standard:ALIVE:$pid" || echo "phase1_factorial_repsim_standard:DEAD:$pid") || echo "phase1_factorial_repsim_standard:NO_PID"
experiment_monitor.progress_check_cmd: cat /home/jinxulin/sibyl_system/projects/CRA/exp/results/phase1_factorial_trak_standard_PROGRESS.json 2>/dev/null || echo "null" && cat /home/jinxulin/sibyl_system/projects/CRA/exp/results/phase1_factorial_trak_contrastive_PROGRESS.json 2>/dev/null || echo "null" && cat /home/jinxulin/sibyl_system/projects/CRA/exp/results/phase1_factorial_repsim_standard_PROGRESS.json 2>/dev/null || echo "null"

pending_hooks.name: lark_sync
pending_hooks.resume_hint: restart the sibyl-lark-sync background agent before continuing the loop

pending_background_agents.name: sibyl-experiment-supervisor
pending_background_agents.resume_hint: restart this background agent with run_in_background=true before resuming the main loop

breadcrumb.description: [1/14] 并行 3 任务 (PILOT), 预计 10min (校准×0.1): phase0_pipeline_pilot→GPU[1], phase0_kfac_control→GPU[2], phase2_eigenspectrum→GPU[3]
